description: The Encapsulate Point node extends the input Bounds such that the output fully encapsulates the input Point.

fields.Bounds: The bounding box to be enlarged. Default value is a bounding box with center [0;0;0] and size [0;0;0].
fields.Point: The point to be encapsulated. Default value is [0;0;0]
fields.* ([[Type:BoundingBox|BoundingBox]]): The Bounds bounding box enlarged to encapsulate the Point. May be identical to Bounds if the Point is already entirely inside Bounds.
